cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. So we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list their starting gifts again to make sure I have them right. - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple present - Dave: yellow present - Eve: white present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go step by step through each swap and track who has what after each one. First swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. Let's see. Initially, Bob has the orange ball and Eve has the white present. After swapping, Bob will have the white present, and Eve will have the orange ball. So now: - Alice: brown -
